^ 'For the man who has no guide, being unable to do good woi ks according to the advice of his Dastdbar, cannot redeem his soul with his holiness ; that is to say, cannot undo his evil deeds with good deeds ' (Comm.) Cf. §§ 24-26.
V. TAHMURAS' FRAGMENTS. 28 1 15. (An Ahu and a Ratu) studious and communicant, learning and teaching, loving with a love for ever renewed, in the bodily world of Righteousness.
XIV. — 16. (Declare) that the worst of all evils is to have no Ahu and no Ratu ;
1 7. Or to have an evil Ahu.
XV. — 18. For the soul of them who have no guide * can never offer up a merit to expiate a sin.
